name: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust 8.50% Senior Notes due 2028
summary: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust 8.50% Senior Notes due 2028 represent a debt obligation of PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust. These are unsecured, unsubordinated debt securities. The notes have a specific maturity date and interest rate, and PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust is based in Calabasas, California.
